title: Catalogue-gate false-rejects DB-enumerated entities (completeness + variant tolerance + school short form)
description: The free-text catalogue-gate (planner/_freetext_audit.py CatalogueUnion/build_catalogue_union/admits) false-rejects values that ARE enumerated in the school DB; it must reject only genuine fabrications. Three modes (Explore live-probe, current-source-verified): (a) COMPLETENESS - framing_vocabularies and priority_tiers are emitted by build_grounding (SECTION_KEYS, builders grounding.py:111/:118) but absent from the union src tuple (_freetext_audit.py:653-668), so their labels (e.g. Student-focused, High) are false-rejected; both models live (school/models/framing.py:26, priority_tier.py:23, no delete migration). (b) VARIANT - admits is exact union_casefold membership (+ -es/-s plural strip) with no hyphen/space/underscore/case collapse, so any formatting variant of any enumerated entity is false-rejected. (c) SHORT FORM - the school brand stem (Chiway-Repton, a token-prefix of Chiway Repton School Xiamen) is false-rejected. Fix (global, pure code, no migration, planner/_freetext_audit.py only): pull the two sections into the union; add a _collapse_normalize helper + a precomputed union_collapsed set (every entry collapse + every >=2-token contiguous prefix of the school name/slug); admits gains one union_collapsed membership check. Preserve fabrication rejection (a name whose collapse matches no entry/prefix still rejects). DEC-45 stands: MissionArea deleted, Caring not enumerated and correctly rejected; no sub-token matching. Surfaced in FEAT-002 apply-smoke; user directive: think globally, no enumerated-from-DB entity is rejected.
impact: DB-enumerated entities (the school name + its short form, framing_vocabularies, priority_tiers, and any catalogued value's formatting variant) were false-rejected as fabrications, blocking legitimate prose in the create-plan draft.
proposed_resolution: Resolved (TASK-013 / VER-003): framing_vocabularies + priority_tiers pulled into the union + PhraseMatcher; a _collapse_normalize helper + a precomputed union_collapsed (every entry collapse + every >=2-token contiguous prefix of the school name/slug); admits gains one union_collapsed membership check. Fabrications still reject. Committed on main.
